case_title: APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY vs. LANDRY, GLENDA et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LANDRY, GLENDA LANDRY, TAVIS
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-26-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 210 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDRY, GLENDA LANDRY, TAVIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 24 COMMER COURT #254 SF $732.89 RENT, $216.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $948.89, STAYED UNTIL DEC-14-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, SAME JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GLENDA LANDRY WHO DID NOT APPE AR.

TJMELLON, JUDGE; JASMIN, CLERK; LEATHLEY, RPTR; BRIAN ROSALES, FOR PLAINTIFF; DEF. T. LANDRY, IPP; DEF GLENDA LANDRY, NOT PRESENT. STIP AS TO DEF T. LANDRY TO SURRENDER POSSESSION OF LEASED PREMISES AT 24 COMMER CT, #254, SF. TO PAY $732.89 AND $216.00 AS COSTS. WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED THROUGH 12/14/01. EVID AS TO DEF GLENDA LANDRY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. SAME JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO SAID DEFENDANT.
